channel.title: Coffee Ratio on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Coffee Ratio on Barista At Home

item.title: Cold Brew Ratio: How Much Coffee to Water for Perfect Cold Brew
item.description: The standard cold brew ratio is 1:8 (1g coffee per 8g water) for regular strength, or 1:4 for concentrate. Here's exactly how much to use for any batch size, plus how to adjust.

item.title: French Press Ratio: How Much Coffee Per Cup (and Why It Matters)
item.description: The ideal French press coffee-to-water ratio is 1:15 — 1 gram of coffee per 15 grams of water. Here's exactly how much to use for every cup size, plus how to adjust for taste.

item.title: Pour Over Coffee Ratio Guide: Drip, V60, Chemex, AeroPress & More
item.description: The standard pour over coffee ratio is 1:15 to 1:17 (1g coffee per 15-17g water). Here are the exact ratios for every manual brewing method, plus tips for dialing in your cup.
